descriptionEn:
**Elephant Beach Bar** brings a colourful tropical atmosphere to the seaside of Pefkochori. Its exotic d√©cor, relaxing beachfront spaces and location close to the water create an inviting setting for a sunny day by the sea.

Guests can enjoy a refreshing cocktail, a smoothie or a light bite while taking in the views of the Aegean Sea and the lively summer atmosphere of Halkidiki. Some parts of the sea entrance may be rocky, so water shoes can provide additional comfort when entering the water.

During busy periods, nearby parking spaces may fill up quickly. Arriving earlier, around opening time, may help make the visit more convenient and relaxed.

Elephant Beach Bar is a great choice for unwinding, meeting friends and enjoying a beautiful summer day by the sea.
